supply_chain.dependencies: Reliance on third-party operators and property managers for RIDEA structures and property management services
risks: Concentration of properties in certain geographic markets, reliance on third-party operators for CCRC facilities, construction and development project execution risks
Labor shortages and increased labor costs, construction material shortages, supply chain disruptions affecting construction and development projects

regulatory_risks: Building performance standards and net zero/carbon neutrality requirements
Healthcare fraud and abuse laws including anti-kickback statutes and Stark Law
Environmental laws and regulations including hazardous substance cleanup liability
Business combination accounting (ASC 805)
Healthcare transaction review and approval requirements by federal and state authorities
Certificate of Need (CON) laws in various states
Derivative accounting and hedge accounting requirements
State licensure and certification requirements for healthcare facilities
Securities regulations (SEC reporting, Sarbanes-Oxley compliance)
Healthcare facility regulations (FDA, healthcare licensing)
Credit loss accounting (CECL model)
CARES Act compliance for government grants
HIPAA privacy and security requirements
Environmental liability regulations
FDIC insurance limitations on cash deposits
Lease accounting standards (ASC 842)
Real estate regulatory compliance including environmental laws (asbestos management)
Americans with Disabilities Act (ADA) compliance requirements
FDA approval requirements for lab tenants' products
New disclosure requirements for nursing facility ownership by CMS
Changes to tax laws affecting REITs and healthcare real estate investment
Property insurance and casualty regulations
Eviction moratorium laws and regulations
Climate change and sustainability regulations
CARES Act Provider Relief Fund compliance and potential recovery actions
State and local income taxes in various jurisdictions
Federal and state income tax compliance for taxable REIT subsidiaries
REIT qualification requirements under Internal Revenue Code
Extensive federal, state, and local healthcare laws and regulations affecting tenants and operators
REIT qualification requirements under Internal Revenue Code Sections 856-860
Medicare and Medicaid reimbursement changes and rate adjustments
